yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_snapconfine__systemdtmpfiles__root_CVE20 {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for snap-confine + systemd-tmpfiles = root (CVE-2026-3888)"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-25"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-3888" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 500 threat advisories. Of these, 103 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 44 as HIGH risk. 22 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-99, CDB-APT-22, UNC-UNKNOWN. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
